bead.title: routing P0: repo isolation + dirty-repo guard with cleanup/revert contract
bead.description: Failed/local attempts in isolated worktrees; worker never drains a dirty/WIP root (helix churned); failure reverts worktree before retry. Must precede escalation + local mixin. See fizeau docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md Addendum for the normative failure-classification table + tier policy.
bead.acceptance: 1. failed attempt leaves canonical repo clean; escalation retry from clean worktree. 2. dirty/WIP root -> operator-attention, no churn loop. 3. test reproduces helix-style churn and asserts it stops. 4. cd ddx/cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... green. 5. lefthook passes.

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: Three hard blockers prevent autonomous execution. First, the normative spec cited as load-bearing ('fizeau docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md Addendum') does not exist in this repository; only FEAT-004-beads.md and a helix plugin-packaging FEAT-004 are present. The Addendum defines the failure-classification table and tier policy that determine what failure modes this bead must handle — without it, implementation scope is undefined. Second, AC #3 requires a test that 'reproduces helix-style churn' but 'helix-style churn' is never defined: no file, no trigger condition, no observable symptom is named that an agent could use to write a test assertion. Third, significant worktree-isolation and dirty-detection infrastructure already exists (attempt_backend.go:101-123, execute_bead_validation.go:40-71, execute_bead.go:595-660 pre-dispatch checkpoint) but the description provides no file:line pointing to the specific gap that remains, so an agent cannot determine what to add without re-reading substantial existing code and guessing.","fingerprint":"5ac5bf1f0164657a0ae772019272dff517d3fcdd50503b2c11476cdb697e5b35","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"5ac5bf1f0164657a0ae772019272dff517d3fcdd50503b2c11476cdb697e5b35"}
